UW-52  SPOT RADIOGRAPHY — ACCEPTANCE STANDARDS. (a) Spot radiographic examination, when permitted by UW-11 and UW-12, shall be performed in accordance with UW-51 except that the extent of examination is limited to the spot locations specified herein. (b) If a spot radiograph reveals unacceptable defects, additional radiographic examination shall be performed. (c) Welders producing unacceptable spot radiographs shall have additional welds examined as required by UW-11. Welder requalification shall be in accordance with QW-301 when defects indicate inadequate performance. For joint efficiency when spot examination is used, see UW-12. Refer to UG-93 for documentation.
